html:
Bones are naturally spawning objects that can be found around Hound Mounds or certain Set Pieces such as the Disused Beefalo Pen Trap.

Players are to be wary around Bones, as they may indicate the presence of Hound Mounds nearby, which will spawn numerous aggressive Hounds that will attack the player or the Bones may be part of traps.

Downloadable Content

In the Reign of Giants DLC, Bones can be found randomly scattered in the Desert Biome. They can also be hammered for Bone Shards. Type 3 bone piece (skull) has a 50% chance to also drop a Hound's Tooth.

Gallery

  • Bone pieces types 1 through 4 in order.
  • Bones as seen in the Spider Trap set piece.
  • Many Bones among Maxwell's Tooth Traps in Adventure Mode.
  • Bones as part of the Disused Beefalo Pen Trap.
  • Bones as found in the Desert.
  • Bones in the Spilagmite biome in Don't Starve Together.
  • Bones in the Blue Mushtree Forest in Don't Starve Together.
  • Bones as seen in the poster for A Little Rain Must Fall update.
DSTDSRoGSWHam
plainText:
Don't Starve
Together
Bones
Object Info
Renewable?
No
Source
Can be Hammered
: Desert
Resources
Miscellaneous
"houndbone" (bone spawned is random)
“Creepy.”
–Wilson
“Gross.”
–Willow
“Wimpy woof dog was not strong enough.”
–Wolfgang
“The remains of an evil beast.”
–Wendy
“EXOSKELETON FOR INSIDES. PROVIDES STRUCTURAL INTEGRITY.”
–WX-78
“The endoskeleton of Canis lupus, definitely not familiaris.”
–Wickerbottom
“It's covered with dog spit, eh?”
–Woodie
“Hungry devils, aren't they?”
–Maxwell
“A beastly banquet has left a pile of skeletal remains.”
–Wagstaff
“A fallen föe.”
–Wigfrid
“There isn't much left.”
–Webber
“It's a bunch of bones. How comforting.”
–Walani
“Hmm, soup stock...”
–Warly
“Th'remains o'somethin'.”
–Woodlegs
“'TIS CHEW'D UP”
–Wilba
“Sharp!”
–Wormwood
“Those hounds don't leave any meat on the bone, do they?”
–Wheeler
“It's covered in tooth marks.”
–Winona
“Short work made by gnashing teeth.”
–Wortox
“Spiky.”
–Wurt
“You probably shouldn't chew on those, Woby.”
–Walter
“Old bones. Let's not dwell on them.”
–Wanda
Bones are naturally spawning objects that can be found around Hound Mounds or certain Set Pieces such as the Disused Beefalo Pen Trap.
Players are to be wary around Bones, as they may indicate the presence of Hound Mounds nearby, which will spawn numerous aggressive Hounds that will attack the player or the Bones may be part of traps.
Downloadable Content[edit | edit source]
In the Reign of Giants DLC, Bones can be found randomly scattered in the Desert Biome. They can also be hammered for Bone Shards. Type 3 bone piece (skull) has a 50% chance to also drop a Hound's Tooth.

'''Bones''' are naturally spawning objects that can be found around [[Hound Mounds]] or certain [[Set Piece]]s such as the Disused Beefalo Pen Trap. 

Players are to be wary around Bones, as they may indicate the presence of [[Hound Mounds]] nearby, which will spawn numerous aggressive [[Hounds]] that will attack the player or the Bones may be part of traps.

=={{Pic32|Gift Icon}} Downloadable Content==
In the ''[[Reign of Giants]]'' DLC, Bones can be found randomly scattered in the [[Desert]] [[Biome]]. They can also be [[hammer]]ed for [[Bone Shards]]. Type 3 bone piece (skull) has a 50% chance to also drop a [[Hound's Tooth]].

=={{Pic|32|Blueprint}} Gallery==

</gallery>
